setup_task.sh creates 3 conversations for Marisa Obrien in Technical Support mailbox (lines 52-82)

pi_items.verified_value: Marisa Obrien and Nicolas Wilson are from Kaggle dataset; David Okafor is NOT in the dataset

privileged_info_summary: The task uses two real customers from the Kaggle Customer Support Ticket Dataset: Marisa Obrien (carrollallison@example.com) from Ticket ID 1 and Nicolas Wilson (joshua24@example.com) from Ticket ID 9. Marisa has 3 pre-seeded conversations in the Technical Support mailbox that need to be tagged. However, David Okafor (david.okafor@techfirm.io) is NOT from the Kaggle dataset and is a synthetic customer created specifically for this task. The data_source metadata claim is therefore incomplete, as it does not account for the synthetic David Okafor customer.
